name: Alpaca
description: Trade US equities, ETFs, options, and crypto and manage a portfolio via Alpaca's official server. Start in the paper environment and review every order.

ALPACA_API_KEY.description: Alpaca API key id, supplied as an env var.

ALPACA_SECRET_KEY.description: Alpaca API secret key, supplied as an env var.

ALPACA_PAPER_TRADE.description: Set to True to use the paper-trading environment, supplied as an env var. Start with paper trading.
